guion_padre.introduccion: Welcome to Lesson 6. Today we will explore some wonderful sounds.
guion_padre.instruccion_o: Point to the big O and say: oooooo. Keep the sound going!
guion_padre.instruccion_f: Now point to the big F and say: ffffff.

parent_story: A fat fox was very hot. The fox sat on a big box with a yellow fan.
